summary: Comprehensive testing of Role Drilldown Page and Status Derivation features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). Status derivation correctly uses result_status field for shortlisted detection.

backend: GET /api/status returns expected counts (8 naukri, 8 pipeline, 8 registered)
GET /api/role?jobRole=Software Developer returns 5 applicants with derived status
GET /api/role?jobRole=Data Analyst returns 3 applicants with derived status
Status derivation rules verified: Rejected=2, Attended=2, Interview Scheduled=2, Shortlisted=1, Registered=1
GET /api/summary returns funnel stats for 2 job roles
GET /api/job-roles returns 2 unique roles with counts
GET /api/role supports page and limit params
GET /api/role supports startDate and endDate params
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Dashboard shows DB Status: Naukri=8, Pipeline=8, Registered=8
Navigation: Dashboard → Roles page via nav button
Roles page shows 2 role cards (Software Developer: 5, Data Analyst: 3)
Role card click navigates to /roles/:jobRole drilldown
Role Drilldown: Shows role title and total applicants count
Role Drilldown: Applicant table with all columns (name, email, phone, gender, date_of_birth, date_of_application, status)
Role Drilldown: Status badges are color-coded (Rejected=red, Attended=green, Interview Scheduled=blue, Shortlisted=amber, Registered=gray)
Role Drilldown: Date filters section with start/end date inputs
Role Drilldown: Filter and Reset buttons work
Role Drilldown: Back button navigates to /roles
Navigation: Dashboard → Summary page via nav button
Summary page shows funnel stats table with 2 job roles

Software Developer (5 applicants).Henry Chen: Interview Scheduled (schedule_date AND schedule_time not NULL)

Data Analyst (3 applicants).Carol Davis: Interview Scheduled (schedule_date AND schedule_time not NULL)

seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: 8 Naukri records and 8 Pipeline records. All 8 matched as registered_candidates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: (1) /api/role returns individual applicant records with derived status, (2) shortlisted detection uses result_status field (not email_type), (3) Status derivation rules: Rejected=result_status matches 'reject', Attended=otp_verified not NULL, Interview Scheduled=schedule_date AND schedule_time not NULL, Shortlisted=result_status matches 'shortlist', Registered=default. (4) RoleDrillDown.js shows applicant table with all columns and color-coded status badges. (5) Summary page shows correct funnel stats using result_status for shortlisted count.
